domain: elementary science, geography, and history lesson guidance and printable browser-native learning surfaces
selected_source_name: SV2 BioSphere Kids multi-subject repository snapshot
license_or_usage_notes: User-owned/local project material imported as a self-contained surface snapshot. No third-party API keys or secret files are included.
attribution_requirements: Attribute BioSphere Kids / SV2 source snapshot and imported public lesson files; imported remote image URLs retain their original public URL posture from SV2.
limitations: No lesson mutation from browser assistant
OKF files are agent-readable documentation; lesson JSON and source manifest remain the authoritative data records.
fallback_source_strategy: If a question is not supported by imported SV2 lesson files or docs, answer with a boundary or clarification instead of inventing.

imported_subjects.label: Science
imported_subjects.description: Life science, earth science, and printable observation lessons.

imported_subjects.label: Geography
imported_subjects.description: Maps, landforms, regions, communities, and place-based reasoning.

imported_subjects.label: History
imported_subjects.description: World history and American history lessons built around evidence, timelines, communities, and civic ideas.

agent_readable_layer.purpose: Expose the full 12-lesson artifact, source posture, assistant boundaries, UI rules, and reconstruction contract to external agents.
